name: renai-agent
description: ren.ai — Autonomous Agentic Trading on Bitget. Five Agent Hub analyst lenses fused into a confluence decision engine: Perceive → Confluence → Risk → Execute → Sync, with a live web dashboard and Telegram copy-trade bot.

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.start: npm run build:frontend && npm --prefix backend run start
